title: Applied Construction Sticks
description: Allows Construction Sticks to use items inside a AE2 network
body:
Applied Construction Sticks
Overview

Applied Construction Sticks add support for construction sticks to use items from your applied energistic network. To connect a Construction Stick to the network simply place the stick inside ME Wireless Access Point. After that your stick will use blocks from your me network instead of your invenotry! Lines turn blue when you are using from your ae2 network 

Support

Join the BBL Discord for support, report bugs and suggest features or additions. You can also support me on Patreon to gain Alpha access to Modpacks and Mods in dev
